violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors of the walk in coolers need cleaned.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. -Sandwiches and biscuits and gravy in the hot hold at less than 140 F are not time stamped.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
